negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_036
prompt: The video opens with a wide shot of a shipping container yard under a clear sky. A large white shipping container labeled "NYK Logistics & Megacarrier" is suspended by a reach stacker, which is in constant motion. Initially, the body of the reach stacker is partially obscured by other containers on the ground. The ground is paved, and in the background, additional containers are visible, along with a few trees and streetlights. The scene suggests an active port or logistics hub. As the video progresses, the camera zooms out, revealing more of the scene while the reach stacker moves smoothly, carrying the container. The reach stacker gradually comes fully into view as it travels in the direction facing the camera. By the final frame, the body of the reach stacker is clearly visible, still carrying the container. The surrounding environment remains unchanged throughout the video, reinforcing the impression of an operational and orderly logistics facility.
